modal.danger.title: Attention, Sir.
modal.danger.description: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this record(s)? This action is irreversible and will affect reports.
modal.danger.batchDescriptionOne: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {count} record? This action is irreversible and will affect reports.
modal.danger.batchDescriptionMany: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {count} records? This action is irreversible and will affect reports.
modal.danger.deleteRevenuesOne: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {count} income record? This action is irreversible.
modal.danger.deleteRevenuesMany: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {count} income records? This action is irreversible.
